    S

    setCoffeeTypes(int) - Method in class Cafe
    Seteaza acest numar de tipuri de cafele disponibile specific.
    setEnd(Location) - Method in class Road
    Seteaza locatia destinatie
    setLocationList(List) - Method in class Problem
    Seteaza lista de locatii.
    setLocationName(String) - Method in class Location
    Seteaza numele locatiei.
    setPopulation(int) - Method in class City
    Seteaza populatia orasului.
    setRestaurantCapacity(int) - Method in class Restaurant
    Seteaza capacitatea specofica.
    setRoadLenght(int) - Method in class Road
    Seteaza lungimea drumului

    Seteaza lista de drumuri.

    Seteaza tipul drumului.
    setSpeedLimit(int) - Method in class Road
    Seteaza limita de viteza.
    setStart(Location) - Method in class Road
    Seteaza locatia de start.
    setTerminalNumber(int) - Method in class Airport
    Seteaza numarul de terminale specific.

    Seteaza coordonata X.

    Seteaza coordonata Y.
